sections.paragraph:
Original: עב עב

Transliteration: ‛âb ‛ôb

Phonetic: awb

BDB Definition:

  1. an architectural term
    1. meaning dubious; perhaps projecting roof, landing, thick beam, plank, threshold

Origin: from an unused root meaning to cover

TWOT entry: 1552a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
